notes: Practice patterns, streamlined: pick a pattern type (Scale, Groups, Intervals, One string) and only the settings that matter appear - group size, interval plus how many strings a pair may span (2-5), or which single string to run the scale on. Plus 0.14's three-view Fretboard page (board / colored tab / sheet music, all playable) and 0.13's always-visible key/tempo bar. NOTE: updating from 0.6.1 or older requires uninstalling the old app first (new signing key).
